_note: Option-1 F5 live before/after capstone. ONE mechanism-first, SINGLE-disease case (heart failure) taken verbatim from scratchpad/option1_test_topics.json (F2 heart_failure.mechanism_first). The disease 'heart failure' appears only in the last clause of model_desc; the use_case names NO disease -> the buried-disease scenario. Single-disease by design so the wide-net arm resolves cleanly WITHOUT the F3 disambiguation pop-up (whose correctness is separately measured 10/10). Frozen engine should MISS the disease; wide-net engine should SURFACE it.
model_desc: A gradient-boosted ensemble model that ingests longitudinal structured EHR vitals, laboratory time-series, and medication-administration records to output a continuously-updated deterioration risk score for patients admitted with decompensated heart failure.
population: adults admitted to a general medicine service
